# OpenNum

OpenNum is an open Bitcoin identity protocol that maps Ordinal inscription numbers to wallet addresses with off-chain signatures.

## Canonical URLs

- Website: https://opennum.org/
- Explorer: https://opennum.org/explore
- Register: https://opennum.org/register
- English whitepaper: https://opennum.org/whitepaper-en
- Chinese whitepaper: https://opennum.org/whitepaper-cn
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/OpenNum/opennum-protocol

## API

- Resolve: GET https://opennum.org/api/resolve?num=2311
- Profile: GET https://opennum.org/api/profile?num=2311
- List: GET https://opennum.org/api/list
- Register: POST https://opennum.org/api/register

## Summary

OpenNum uses a dual-anchor model: the human-readable inscription number and the inscription transaction id. Users register by proving wallet control with a signed message. The hosted registry is Phase 2 alpha and currently supports Unisat Wallet registration.
